segments.text: When all these things come upon you—the blessings and curses I have set before you—and you call them to mind in all the nations to which the LORD your God has banished you,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and when you and your children return to the LORD your God and obey His voice with all your heart and all your soul according to everything I am giving you today,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: then He will restore you from captivity and have compassion on you and gather you from all the nations to which the LORD your God has scattered you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Even if you have been banished to the farthest horizon, He will gather you and return you from there.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the LORD your God will bring you into the land your fathers possessed, and you will take possession of it. He will cause you to prosper and multiply more than your fathers.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The LORD your God will circumcise your hearts and the hearts of your descendants, and you will love Him with all your heart and with all your soul, so that you may live.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Then the LORD your God will put all these curses upon your enemies who hate you and persecute you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And you will again obey the voice of the LORD and follow all His commandments I am giving you today.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So the LORD your God will make you abound in all the work of your hands and in the fruit of your womb, the offspring of your livestock, and the produce of your land. Indeed, the LORD will again delight in your goodness, as He delighted in that of your fathers,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: if you obey the LORD your God by keeping His commandments and statutes that are written in this Book of the Law, and if you turn to Him with all your heart and with all your soul.
segments.speaker: The LORD

text: The Choice of Life or Death

segments.text: For this commandment I give you today is not too difficult for you or beyond your reach.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: It is not in heaven, that you should need to ask, ‘Who will ascend into heaven to get it for us and proclaim it, that we may obey it?’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And it is not beyond the sea, that you should need to ask, ‘Who will cross the sea to get it for us and proclaim it, that we may obey it?’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But the word is very near you; it is in your mouth and in your heart, so that you may obey it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: See, I have set before you today life and goodness, as well as death and disaster.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: For I am commanding you today to love the LORD your God, to walk in His ways, and to keep His commandments, statutes, and ordinances, so that you may live and increase, and the LORD your God may bless you in the land that you are entering to possess.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: But if your heart turns away and you do not listen, but are drawn away to bow down to other gods and worship them,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I declare to you today that you will surely perish; you shall not prolong your days in the land that you are crossing the Jordan to possess.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: I call heaven and earth as witnesses against you today that I have set before you life and death, blessing and cursing. Therefore choose life, so that you and your descendants may live,
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: and that you may love the LORD your God, obey Him, and hold fast to Him. For He is your life, and He will prolong your life in the land that the LORD swore to give to your fathers, to Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.
segments.speaker: Moses
